ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position played by the player (e.g., CB, FW) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* The player's social media handle (e.g., @alex_callens) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Code for the team (e.g., NYC, SKC) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* The name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* The capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* The URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* The name of the current team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the home team at the end of the game */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* The score of the away team at the end of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* The name of the referee for the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* The weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the statistic was recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who recorded the statistic */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., CB) */,
  "passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "pass_pct" REAL /* Pass completion percentage */,
  "xpass_pct" REAL /* Expected pass completion percentage */,
  "score" REAL /* Score (e.g., 50.3042) */,
  "per_100" REAL /* Performance metric (e.g., 4.83694) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the player */,
  "vertical" REAL /* Vertical distance covered by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* A description of any injuries sustained by the player during the game */,
  "substitution_time" TEXT /* The time the player was substituted in or out of the game */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* A performance rating given to the player for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played by the player */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The time the player started the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The time the player ended the game */,
  "substitution_in" TEXT /* The time the player was substituted into the game */,
  "substitution_out" TEXT /* The time the player was substituted out of the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* The injury status of the player for the game (e.g., fit, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who signed the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that signed the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract (e.g., $564,000) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (e.g., 3 years) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* The status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* The signing bonus amount given to the player */,
  "weekly_salary" REAL /* The weekly salary of the player */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* The name of the player's agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* The contact information of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
